biography:
Samarth Panwar (born 5 July 2009), known professionally as Arjan Panwar, is an Indian actor, singer, songwriter, rapper, model and businessman. He is widely known for his contribution in Haryanvi cinema and music industry.

He was born on 5 July 2009 in Kaimla village of Haryana, India in a Ror family of Dankher clan to businessman Sandeep Panwar and Asha Devi. He is the elder brother of Ishika Panwar, who is an actress and dancer. As a child, Panwar studied at Jawahar Navodaya Vidyalaya in Sagga, Karnal.
name: Arjan Panwar
